name: Percentage of increase in revenue
formula: ((Sales value of the current period - Sales value of the previous period) / Sales value of the previous period) *100

name: Percentage of increase in exports
formula: ((Value of exports of the current period - Value of exports of the previous period) / Value of exports of the previous period) * 100

name: Change in the budget
formula: (Actual budget/Plan budget * 100) - 100

name: Training index
formula: (Number of training actions / Total number of employees)

name: Percentage of specialists leave
formula: (Total departures / Average number of workers in the period) * 100

name: Percentage decrease in the number of cases of indiscipline
formula: ((Cases of indiscipline from the previous period - Cases of indiscipline from the current period) / Cases of indiscipline from the previous period) * 100

name: Corruption cases
formula: Number of corruption cases

name: Fraud cases
formula: Number of fraud cases

name: Saving electrical energy
formula: ((Energy expenditure of the previous year - Energy expenditure of the current period) / Energy expenditure of the previous year) * 100

name: Percentage of server virtualisation
formula: (1 - (Number of physical servers / Numbers of virtual servers)) * 100

name: Percentage of virtual meetings and conferences
formula: (Number of virtual meetings / Numbers of working days) * 100

name: Percentage of certified and accredited processes
formula: (Total number of certified and accredited processes / Total number of processes) * 100

name: Effectiveness in fulfilling the mission
formula: (Number of students with all subjects passed + Number of students with one failed subject + Number of students with two failed subjects, but from different semesters) / Total enrolment

name: Percentage compliance with project milestones
formula: (Achievement of actual milestones / Achievement of planned milestones) * 100

name: Percentage of client retention
formula: (Number of customers retained in the period / Total number of customers in the period) * 100

name: PhD rates
formula: (Number of PhDs / Number of full, assistant and associate professors) * 100

name: Master's rates
formula: (Number of master's degrees / Number of teachers and specialists) * 100

name: Index of Group I and II publications by teacher
formula: (Number of Group I and II publications / Total number of teachers) * 100

name: Percentage increase in projects
formula: (Projects of the current period - Projects of the previous period) / Projects of the previous period *100

name: Percentage of projects successfully closed
formula: (Number of successfully closed projects / Total number of projects for the period) *100
